Confidence 90%.
Sentences used:
(1) Squirrels can fly.
(2) Which can fly?
Proof steps:
(1) A squirrel is a squirrel  [sentence 1]
(2) If some X is a squirrel then X performs the flying event sk5 of X  [sentence 1]
(3) A squirrel performs the flying event sk5 of $some_squirrel  [from steps 1, 2]
(4) If X is a fly event and some W performs X and X is an activity and X is a capability then W is the answer  [sentence 2]
(5) If the flying event sk5 of $some_squirrel is an activity and sk5 of $some_squirrel is a capability and sk5 of $some_squirrel is a fly event then a squirrel is the answer  [from steps 3, 4]
(6) If some X is a squirrel then sk5 of X is a fly event  [sentence 1]
(7) sk5 of $some_squirrel is a fly event  [from steps 1, 6]
(8) If some X is a squirrel then the flying event sk5 of X is an activity  [sentence 1]
(9) The flying event sk5 of $some_squirrel is an activity  [from steps 1, 8]
(10) If the flying event sk5 of $some_squirrel is a capability then a squirrel is the answer  [from steps 5, 7, 9]
(11) technical answer unwrap step  [from question]
(12) If the flying event sk5 of $some_squirrel is a capability then a squirrel is an answer  [from steps 10, 11]
(13) If some X is a squirrel then normally the flying event sk5 of X is a capability  [sentence 1, confidence 90%]
(14) If a squirrel is a squirrel then a squirrel is an answer, except when the flying event sk5 of $some_squirrel is not a capability  [from steps 12, 13, confidence 90%]
(15) A squirrel is an answer, except when the flying event sk5 of $some_squirrel is not a capability  [from steps 14, 1, confidence 90%]
